plugins.name: Radarr Sync
plugins.description: Sync an Otix list with Radarr. Add movies to your watchlist and they auto-download via Radarr with full quality profile and root folder configuration.
plugins.author: Diogo da Silva

plugins.name: Hello World
plugins.description: A test plugin that validates the Otix plugin system by demonstrating event subscriptions, local database, API calls, notifications, and logging.
plugins.author: Diogo da Silva
